# STRAT.005 ? Guerrilla Warfare (Mao/Guevara)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** military_strategic
**Domain:** MILITARY_STRATEGIC
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Asymmetric advantage; blend with population; hit and run; protracted struggle; political-military fusion; popular support

## Application
Use asymmetric tactics; secure base; quick strikes then withdraw; long-term perspective; win hearts and minds; avoid strength

## Key Values
- Asymmetry
- Popular support
- Patience
- Mobility
- Political base
